SystemRole: You will be provided with multiple functions of a program, and your task is to combine them into a single program so that it is compilable.
SystemRoleFunctionTranslate: You will be provided with a piece of function, and your task is to translate it into a given programming language so that it is syntactic and semantically correct.
MessageFunctionTranslate:
{FUNCTION}

All the function calls mentioned exist and therefore do not have to be included.
Be aware of the properties of the data types in {TEXT_SOURCE_LANG} and accurately translate the functionality into {TEXT_TARGET_LANG}.
Do not include any extra function calls or print statements beyond what is required to correctly implement the code in {TEXT_TARGET_LANG}.
Ensure that variables are defined before use and methods are defined before being invoked.
Avoid naming conflicts by ensuring unique names for variables and methods.
